description: You are a Process Validation Engineer at OfficeTech Manufacturing conducting a readiness review before an annual FDA 21 CFR Part 820 inspection. Add a specific failure message to every Quality Control Point (QCP) that currently lacks one, ensuring the message instructs the inspector on what action to take upon failure. Additionally, create a new QCP of type 'Measure' for the 'Customizable Desk' product to verify the height adjustment force is within specification, including a failure message for this new control point. Log in to the quality management system at http://localhost:8069 with username admin and password admin.
